title: peh #6310
definition:
peh
 1) mouth
    1a) mouth (of man)
    1b) mouth (as organ of speech)
    1c) mouth (of animals)
    1d) mouth, opening, orifice (of a well, river, etc)
    1e) extremity, end
 pim
 2) a weight equal to one third of a shekel, occurs only in \\#1Sa 13:21\\
